narrative: An NLP Engineer at Ola with seven years of experience, bringing product‑company exposure and a solid track record in building search‑focused solutions. Strong verified skill depth is the main factor placing them at #70. Their work with Weaviate, BM25, LlamaIndex and Elasticsearch/OpenSearch aligns directly with the search and retrieval responsibilities, and they have applied PyTorch to train and fine‑tune language models for ranking. However, they are based in Chandigarh, have an unknown notice period, and exhibit modest platform engagement and minor credibility flags, which limit immediate fit for the Pune/Noida product team.
